name: Band Protocol
description: Band Protocol is a cross-chain data oracle platform that aggregates and connects real-world data and APIs to smart contracts. Built on BandChain, a high-performance Cosmos SDK blockchain, it enables developers to query price feeds, oracle scripts, data requests, and verifiable random numbers for use in decentralized applications across multiple blockchains.

hasOfferCatalog.name: Band Protocol APIs and Developer Tools

itemListElement.name: BandChain REST API
itemListElement.description: HTTP access to BandChain mainnet data including oracle scripts, data requests, price feeds, validator information, account balances, and all Cosmos SDK module queries.

itemListElement.name: BandChain gRPC API
itemListElement.description: High-performance protocol buffer access to BandChain nodes for querying oracle data, submitting data requests, and managing accounts.

itemListElement.name: BandChain.js SDK
itemListElement.description: Comprehensive TypeScript library for seamless interaction with BandChain and Cosmos SDK blockchains.

itemListElement.name: PyBand Python SDK
itemListElement.description: Python SDK for interacting with BandChain via gRPC, enabling querying oracle scripts, data sources, and sending transactions.

itemListElement.name: Band VRF
itemListElement.description: Provably fair, verifiable random function for on-chain randomness, suitable for NFT minting, gaming, lotteries, and DeFi.

itemListElement.name: Band Standard Dataset
itemListElement.description: Open standard for creating and accessing custom price feeds delivering efficient and secure financial data directly to smart contracts.
